subtitle: QQQ signal, prior data only. Trades execute at today's open in TQQQ or QLD.

indicators.label: SSLP20_2
indicators.description: 20-day SMA versus its value 2 trading days earlier (prior data only).

indicators.label: RV5
indicators.description: Standard deviation of prior 5 QQQ open-to-open returns.

indicators.label: RV7
indicators.description: Standard deviation of prior 7 QQQ open-to-open returns.

indicators.label: SR63_126
indicators.description: 63-day prior SMA divided by 126-day prior SMA.

formula_definitions: SMA20[t] = average of QQQ Opens from t-1 to t-20.
RV5[t] = standard deviation of prior 5 QQQ open-to-open returns.
RV7[t] = standard deviation of prior 7 QQQ open-to-open returns.
plain_english: Stay invested when either the 20-day SMA has dropped enough over the last 2 trading days or 150-day momentum is better than -1%.
Also require short-term open-to-open volatility to stay low.
Also require the 63-day trend not to be too stretched above the 126-day trend.
